required_contains.text: admission is continuous without interval-based registration windows; burn half life governs how the
live charge decays between successful registration events
Burn half life shapes decay timing, not per-block registration throughput.
`MaxRegistrationsPerBlock` limits how many registrations can succeed on a netuid in the current
block, which is separate from how quickly the live burn eases back toward the floor between those

forbidden_contains.text: registration is continuous with no windows or per-block caps; burn half life governs how the live
charge decays between those registration events
